title: Excalibur | Hearth and Harvest Delight Support
description: Excaliburized Fields, Honed by Flame! - Crafted for Farmer’s Delight
body:
![Title](https://i.imgur.com/VlUKoW1.png)

![Food Showcase1](https://i.imgur.com/CObIsOp.png)

![Block Showcase1](https://i.imgur.com/DPSnfiT.png)

This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Hearth and Harvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/hearth-and-harvest) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Features:**

*   3D crops that make farming look fuller and more dynamic
*   Some functional blocks upgraded with simple 3D detail
*   A consistent aesthetic, built to match [Excalibur Farmer’s Delight](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excalibur-farmers-delight-support)

**Credits:**

*   Maffhew – Creator of Excalibur
*   AlabasterLeking – Creator of Hearth and Harvest
*   [TC](https://www.curseforge.com/members/tc_/projects) – For his Excalibur Farmer's Delight Support, which this addon is based on

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

Curseforge
